mainEntity.name: Which photography style is most popular in 2025?

acceptedAnswer.text: Portrait photography remains the largest share (~18%), followed by landscape (14%) and travel (12%). Portraits are versatile across personal, corporate and creative use cases.

mainEntity.name: How do I find my photography style?

acceptedAnswer.text: Explore different genres, practice regularly, and look for recurring themes in your favourite images. Personal projects and challenges help refine your voice.

mainEntity.name: Is fine art photography different from other styles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Fine art photography expresses an artistic vision or concept, often symbolic or emotive. Unlike commercial work, it is created primarily for exhibitions and collectors.
